product.name: Machinist
product.target: Precision tech e-commerce / industrial tools / machining equipment
product.aesthetic: Dark industrial — safety orange on deep black, grid lines, grayscale-to-color image reveals
product.author: Dylan Burkey

items: Header with navigation and live cart count badge
Cart drawer with Shopify section rendering API refresh
Product detail page with variant selector and price updates
Product collection grid with product-card snippet
Footer with newsletter, navigation, social links
shoppable-image-enhanced — 5 hotspot marker types, interactive product discovery
builder-grid — 12-column page builder replacing PageFly/Shogun (10 block types)
smart-grid — container query featured cards with multiple layouts
container-grid — bento layout with container queries
faq — advanced FAQ with faceted search + category filtering (3 display modes)
side-menu — documentation sidebar with reading progress indicator
social-sharing — share buttons + copy-link (Twitter/X, Facebook, LinkedIn, Pinterest)
variant-selector with URL and price updates
ESLint (flat config) with JSDoc enforcement, zero warnings policy
Husky pre-commit hook (lint-staged on staged files only)
GitHub Actions production deploy workflow (manual, requires DEPLOY confirmation)

shopping.addToCart: variant-selector changes → updatePrice → add-to-cart-button click → POST cart_add → cart:updated event → cart-drawer opens + header-cart updates

discovery.search: header search icon → main-search results → product-card → main-product
discovery.shoppable: shoppable-image-enhanced hotspot click → product card popup → product link

themeEditorCapabilities.sections: All .liquid sections in sections/ are available in theme editor
themeEditorCapabilities.customization: Per-section settings via {% schema %} blocks; colors, fonts, sizes configurable
themeEditorCapabilities.blocks: builder-grid, smart-grid, container-grid, faq, shoppable-image-enhanced all support blocks for dynamic content

performance.images: lazy loading on all images, srcset responsive images in smart-grid
performance.js: defer loading for all scripts, no framework overhead
performance.css: No external CSS frameworks; custom properties for runtime theming
